_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data modeling techniques including conceptual, logical, and physical modeling, entity-relationship modeling, dimensional modeling, and data vault methodology.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-002 (AI, cosine: 0.575), OP-K-005 (OP, cosine: 0.566).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.640). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [developing, models, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [conceptual, dimensional, entity, knowledge, logical, methodology] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.895 (P=0.936, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.078 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Skill in developing data models." and "Knowledge of data modeling techniques including conceptual, logical, and physica" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.612 ≈ STS 0.640 (gap 0.028). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.3%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [developing, models, skill]. WIDAI-only: [conceptual, dimensional, entity, knowledge, logical, methodology].
